---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature, page, algorithm, or data source
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement
What user need or product gap does this address?

## Proposed Solution
Describe the feature, algorithm, page, or integration.

## Alternatives Considered
What else did you consider? Why is this the best approach?

## Scope
- [ ] New static page (add to build_site.ts)
- [ ] New algorithm (blindspot, heatmap, timeline, framing, newsletter)
- [ ] New data source / source registry entry
- [ ] UI/UX improvement (CSS, JS, accessibility)
- [ ] Build/CI improvement
- [ ] Documentation

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Implementation Notes
Technical approach, files to touch, dependencies.

## Breaking Changes
Does this change the data schema (`scripts/lib/data.ts`), API (`api/*.json`), or public HTML structure?

## Checklist
- [ ] I've read CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] This aligns with the "Not Left/Right. Who Owns The Story." mission
